title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.100 - Fines recorded — how paid
text:
66.100.  Fines recorded — how paid. — All fines paid in prosecutions involving the violation of a county ordinance shall be recorded in a separate docket of fines, and the officer collecting such fines shall turn them over to the county treasurer to be credited as provided by ordinance; and all costs shall be assessed, charged and paid as in other misdemeanor cases in circuit courts.
(L. 1951 p. 397 § 10, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
